From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1924 film

| Reveille | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [George Pearson](/wiki/George_Pearson_(filmmaker) "George Pearson (filmmaker)") |
| Written by | George Pearson |
| Produced by | George Pearson |
| Starring | [Betty Balfour](/wiki/Betty_Balfour "Betty Balfour") |
| Cinematography | [Basil Emmott](/wiki/Basil_Emmott "Basil Emmott") [Percy Strong](/wiki/Percy_Strong "Percy Strong") |
| Production company | [Welsh-Pearson](/wiki/Welsh-Pearson "Welsh-Pearson") |
| Distributed by | [Gaumont British Distributors](/wiki/Gaumont_British_Distributors "Gaumont British Distributors") |
| Release date | * June 1924 (1924-06) |
| Running time | 93 minutes |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| Language | Silent |

***Reveille*** is a 1924 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [drama film](/wiki/Drama_film "Drama film") directed by [George Pearson](/wiki/George_Pearson_(filmmaker) "George Pearson (filmmaker)"). It follows some British soldiers during and after the [First World War](/wiki/First_World_War "First World War"), though Pearson wrote in a January 1924 letter to his cast and crew:

> There is no story, as such. I hate the well-made Story with its Exposition, Denouement, Crisis, etc., as material for my elusive Screen. I confess I cannot write one.[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1)

As of August 2010, the film is missing from the [BFI National Archive](/wiki/BFI_National_Archive "BFI National Archive"), and is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" lost films, though at least some sequences survive in private hands.[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1) It is sometimes confused with the 1925 German film *[Reveille: The Great Awakening](/wiki/Reveille:_The_Great_Awakening "Reveille: The Great Awakening")*.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Reveille_(film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Betty Balfour](/wiki/Betty_Balfour "Betty Balfour") as Mick
* [Stewart Rome](/wiki/Stewart_Rome "Stewart Rome") as Nutty
* [Ralph Forbes](/wiki/Ralph_Forbes "Ralph Forbes") as The Kid
* [Sydney Fairbrother](/wiki/Sydney_Fairbrother "Sydney Fairbrother") as Sophie Fitch
* [Frank Stanmore](/wiki/Frank_Stanmore_(actor) "Frank Stanmore (actor)") as Whelks
* [Henrietta Watson](/wiki/Henrietta_Watson "Henrietta Watson") as The Mother
* Guy Phillips as Fred
* [Walter Tennyson](/wiki/Walter_Tennyson "Walter Tennyson") as Captain
* Charles Ashton as Sam
* Donald Searle as Ted
* Buena Bent as Amelia Fitch
* [Simeon Stuart](/wiki/Simeon_Stuart "Simeon Stuart") as Colonel
